interpretation: Reference current Fluid contract at CFD mdot; not boundary parity.
radiation_policy: For realized-wallHeatFlux diagnostic replay, do not add a separate 1D radiation term on top of CFD wallHeatFlux. For external-BC parity mode, treat radiation as inseparable inside the rcExternalTemperature equivalent unless a future OpenFOAM output or source audit exposes a separate qr/radiation heat term.
